note: Mathlib/Probability/Combinatorics/BinomialRandomGraph/Defs.lean:46 def binomialRandom : Measure (SimpleGraph V) — the G(V,p) binomial random graph measure; file docstring: 'This is usually called the Erdős–Rényi model' (named 'binomial random graph' in-file to distinguish from Erdős/Rényi's original uniform G(n,M) model, but this is the object the Wikidata concept denotes).

Directory exists with real content: KraftMcMillan.lean (Kraft-McMillan inequality for prefix/uniquely-decodable codes) and UniquelyDecodable.lean (def UniquelyDecodable + epsilon_not_mem, flatten_injective); confirmed present in catalog/data/hierarchy.json as Mathlib.InformationTheory.Coding.KraftMcMillan / .UniquelyDecodable. Field-level container, not a single-theorem match.
